code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Initializing: Component mounted

    Initializing --> Loading: Subscribe to DMs
    Loading --> Empty: No messages
    Loading --> ThreadList: Messages loaded
    Loading --> Error: Subscription failed

    Empty --> ThreadList: First message received

    ThreadList --> ThreadSelected: User selects thread
    ThreadSelected --> ThreadList: Back to list
    ThreadSelected --> Composing: User types message

    Composing --> Encrypting: User sends
    Encrypting --> Publishing: Encryption complete
    Publishing --> ThreadSelected: Publish success
    Publishing --> Error: Publish failed

    ThreadSelected --> MarkingRead: Auto-mark as read
    MarkingRead --> ThreadSelected: Update complete

    ThreadList --> Refreshing: Pull to refresh
    Refreshing --> ThreadList: Refresh complete

    ThreadSelected --> Deleting: User deletes thread
    Deleting --> ThreadList: Delete complete

    Error --> ThreadList: Retry success
    Error --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: Fatal error

    note right of Encrypting
        NIP04Service encrypts
        message using recipient's
        public key
    end note

    note right of Publishing
        EventPublisherService
        publishes kind 4 event
        to relays
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech的私信模块画一个状态图。核心场景是：LabAnalyzer组件挂载后开始初始化，订阅DM消息，然后进入消息列表。用户能选会话、发消息、删除线程，还要有自动标记已读和拉取刷新。
明白。发消息这块需要细分吗？比如从输入到真正发出去，中间有没有加密环节？另外错误处理要画到什么程度？
要的，发消息分三步：用户在Composing状态输入，点击发送后进入Encrypting用NIP04加密，然后Publishing把kind 4事件发到中继。错误的话，普通错误可以重试回到列表，但Fatal error要终止到EMR同步模块。
好的，我把主线画出来了：Initializing→Loading→ThreadList，然后分支到Empty（无消息）或直接进入列表。ThreadSelected可以回到列表、进入Composing、或者触发MarkingRead自动标记已读。
对，MarkingRead完成更新后要回到ThreadSelected。还有Deleting删除线程，完成后也回到ThreadList。另外ThreadList支持Pull to refresh进入Refreshing状态。
已加上。Encrypting和Publishing旁边我加了注释说明：NIP04Service用接收方公钥加密，EventPublisherService发布kind 4事件。这样技术细节更清晰。
Publishing到Error的箭头方向反了，应该是Publishing失败时进入Error，而不是Error指向Publishing。还有ThreadSelected到ThreadList的Back to list标签要确认是双向的。
已修正，Publishing→Error是发布失败，Error→ThreadList是重试成功。ThreadSelected和ThreadList的双向Back to list也确认无误。整个状态流转应该完整了。
没问题了。最后确认一下：Loading状态如果订阅失败进Error，空列表时收到第一条消息能自动转到ThreadList，这些边界情况都覆盖到了。可以定稿。
